title: Master v0.4.2 Discord Button Handler Fix
notes:
Fixes Discord Notifications buttons so Save, Load, Test Message, and Clear Webhook respond correctly.

Changes:
- Hardwires Discord notification button click handlers.
- Adds robust fallback binding after page load.
- Adds API aliases for Discord notification IPC calls.
- Keeps Discord webhook settings.
- Keeps test Discord webhook message.
- Keeps notification alerts for backups, submissions, access changes, policies, and version control.

Important:
- If you pasted a webhook and shared a screenshot, delete that Discord webhook and create a new one.
- Treat Discord webhook URLs like passwords.
